name: Felix Cat Pouch 85g Beef
shortDescription: FELIX Cat Pouch 85g with Beef  a nutritionally balanced wet food made with tender meaty chunks in a rich, savory jelly . Specially formulated for adult cats, this meal provides essential vitamins, minerals, and Omega 6 fatty acids to support overall health, shiny fur, and vitality.
description: Meat and animal derivatives, fish and fish derivatives (tuna 4%), minerals, various sugars. Nutrition & Analytical Constituents • Moisture: 82.0% • Protein: 11.5% • Fat content: 2.5% • Crude ash: 2.5% • Crude fibre: 0.05% • Linoleic acid (Omega-6): 0.4% • ME value: 67 kcal/100g Nutritional Additives (per kg) • Vitamin A: 585 IU • Vitamin D3: 90 IU • Vitamin E: 13 IU • Iron (Fe): 20 mg • Iodine (I): 0.26 mg • Copper (Cu): 2.3 mg • Manganese (Mn): 4.0 mg • Zinc (Zn): 33 mg Feeding Guide For an average adult cat (4 kg), feed 3–4 pouches per day in at least 2 separate meals. Adjust feeding amounts to maintain a healthy body weight. Serve at room temperature with fresh, clean drinking water available at all times.
